refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain is torn and has a visible flower pattern. The tear appears to be noticeable.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member in the hospital and noticed that the privacy curtain in their room was torn. This made me concerned about their privacy and the overall cleanliness of the hospital. I hope this can be addressed soon.
voice_text: The privacy curtain in my family member's hospital room is all torn, it's really concerning.
